nasb.text: “When your fathers tested Me, They tried Me, though they had seen My work.

esv.text: when your fathers put me to the test and put me to the proof, though they had seen my work.

cnv.text: 在那裡你們的祖先雖曾見過我的作為， 還是試探我，考驗我。

ccb.text: 耶和华说：“虽然他们见过我的作为， 却仍然试探我。

csbs.text: 在那里，你们的祖先尽管看见了我的作为， 还是试探我、试验我。
